VAL-DAEMON-001.evidence: TaskCreate returned task ID with correlation_id, TaskList returned task array with 2 tasks. Unix socket communication working correctly.

VAL-DAEMON-002.evidence: SIGTERM received and handled properly. Log shows: 'Shutdown in progress', 'All active connections completed', 'Socket file removed', 'Daemon shutdown complete'. No zombie processes.

VAL-DAEMON-003.evidence: Invalid command 'InvalidCommand' returned proper Error response with 'message' field. Error structure: {"type": "Error", "payload": {"message": "..."}}
